COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-05-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Joseph Morehead, Esq. for Plaintiff: Terri Alice McNally.
, present, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Co-Defendant: Brian Hughes.
10:10 a.m. Plaintiff: Terri Alice McNally, was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1- Photos--------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Greeting Card-------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3- Copy of Note--------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4- Thiry-day notice to plaintiff dtd. Nov. 11, 2001--------ID/EVID.
After the Court hears testimony and evidence presented in court, matter is taken under submission.
Counsel to prepare a Proposed Judgment with blank amount for damages, the Court will grants Judgment in favor of the Plaintiff and against Co-Defendant: Brian Hughes, amount to be determined.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the exhibits in open court.
12:30 p.m. Proposed Judgment rec'd in court.
Nov. 4, 2004 Judgment granted as follows:
Compensatory Damages $100,000.00
Punitive Damages $100,000.00
Attorney's Fees $15,000.00, for a total of $215,000.00
Judgment signed by Comm. Sue Kaplan.
